title: corylus cornuta subsp. californica
intro: Corylus cornuta subsp. californica, also known as the California hazelnut, is a shrub or small tree belonging to the birch family (Betulaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of the California hazelnut include supporting cardiovascular health, reducing inflammation, and providing antioxidant protection. The herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
